steps.title: Identify the parallel lines and transversal
steps.content: Line $AC$ cuts through the two parallel lines $BC$ and $AD$, making it a transversal. The angle $x°$ at point $C$ (between $BC$ and $AC$) and the angle $y°$ at point $A$ (between $AC$ and $AD$) are interior angles on opposite sides of the transversal.

steps.title: Apply the Alternate Interior Angles Theorem
steps.content:
When a transversal cuts two parallel lines, alternate interior angles are equal. Here, $\angle BCA = x°$ and $\angle CAD = y°$ are alternate interior angles. Therefore, $y = x$.

Since $x = 22$, we have $y = 22$. That matches choice A — A is correct.
